children.heading: Report on resource needs
children.label: a Report on resource needs
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Director shall provide a report to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate, the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives, and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate on the resources and the number of full time employees needed to carry out the functions of the office established in .August 9, 20221section 19031 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “full-time”.1

children.heading: Annual report on Office activities
children.label: b Annual report on Office activities
A
children.text: a description of the activities conducted by the Office, including administrative actions taken;

children.label: B
children.text: such recommendations as the Director may have for legislative or administrative action relating to improving research security;

children.label: C
children.text: identification and discussion of the gaps in legal authorities that need to be improved to enhance the security of institutions of higher education performing research supported by the Foundation; and

children.label: D
children.text: information on Foundation Inspector General cases, as appropriate, relating to undue influence and security threats to research and development activities funded by the Foundation, including theft of property or intellectual property relating to a project funded by the Foundation at an institution of higher education.

children.heading: Form
children.label: 2 Form
children.text: The report submitted under paragraph (1) shall be submitted in both unclassified and classified formats, as appropriate.
